mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY signup_time ASC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY signup_time DESC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY signup_time DESC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_task_record SET status = #{status} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE volunteer_task_record SET status = 2, check_in_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE volunteer_task_record SET status = 3, check_out_time = NOW(), hours = #{hours} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_task_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY signup_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
